sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuid (id UUID, dt DateTime64(3));
UPDATE test_uuid SET dt = UUIDv7ToDateTime(toUUID('018f05c9-4ab8-7b86-b64e-c9f03fbd45d1'), 'Europe/London') WHERE id = toUUID('018f05c9-4ab8-7b86-b64e-c9f03fbd45d1');
SELECT id, UUIDv7ToDateTime(id) AS timestamp FROM test_uuid WHERE dt > '2024-01-01 00:00:00.000';
